system.benefit: Charm Test to extend Hatred bonus to allies
system.description: The character's belief in the righteousness of his hatred is so ingrained in his being that he can inspire the same hate in others. As a Full Action, make a Charm Test to extend the effects of the character's Hatred Talent to nearby allies. Success on the test confers a +10 bonus to WS when fighting hated foes to one ally per point of the character's Fellowship Bonus. The effects last for the duration of the encounter.
